name: Microwave Apricot Balls
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Wheat squares; bite-size, coarsely crushed
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter in a 2 1/2 quart bowl. Cook, uncovered on high power for 30 seconds to 1 minute or until melted.
2. Add the slightly beaten egg, snipped dried apricots, sugar, and flour; stir until well combined.
3. Microwave, uncovered, for 3 1/2 to 4 1/2 minutes or until very thick, stirring every minute.
4. Remove from microwave and let cool about 5 minutes.
5. Add the crushed shredded wheat squares, chopped walnuts, and almond extract; stir until well combined.
6. Shape into 1-inch balls.
7. Store tightly covered in refrigerator. Makes about 40 pieces.
